# Frontier Training Submodules

- `verl`: RLVR and post-training framework with `vLLM` and `SGLang` integration
- `liger-kernel`: Triton kernel stack for faster and more memory-efficient training
- `torchtitan`: clean PyTorch-native large-scale pretraining platform

These repos matter because compactness and exactness are now products of both model design and training systems.
